- 修复没有开启访问所有文件权限时，移动视频可能直接失败的问题
- 支持通过系统确认来移动单个视频，减少手动授予额外权限的需要

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Fix videos sometimes failing to move when all files access is not enabled
- Support moving a video through the system confirmation prompt, reducing the need to grant extra access manually

</details>
